metadata.logicalName: QUL Ayah Theme Public Schema Evidence
metadata.mediaType: HTML audit evidence; advertised dataset format is SQLite
HTML audit evidence; advertised dataset formats are JSON and SQLite

metadata.logicalName: QUL Topics and Concepts Public Schema Evidence
metadata.mediaType: HTML audit evidence; advertised dataset format is SQLite
Eight JSON and eight SQLite files

metadata.logicalName: QUL QPC Hafs Ayah by Ayah

metadata.mediaType: Simple, inline-footnote, footnote-tag, and chunk JSON/SQLite variants

metadata.licenseName: No copyright information supplied by QUL
metadata.attribution: QUL Ayah Themes; original authorship, methodology, and required attribution remain unresolved
metadata.notes: Contains 1,049 unique records duplicated exactly once, producing 2,098 rows. Unique ranges cover 6,200 ayahs without overlap and leave 36 ayahs uncovered. No confidence field exists.

nodes.label: QUL Ayah Theme Public Schema Evidence

metadata.licenseName: No copyright information supplied by QUL
metadata.attribution: Quranic Universal Library resource page; original source attribution remains unresolved
metadata.notes: Public page reports 1,049 grouped themes. Published columns contain no confidence score. Download requires sign-in and the preview shows a likely malformed keyword.

metadata.licenseName: No copyright information supplied by QUL for audited resources
metadata.attribution: Quranic Universal Library resource pages; original tafsir attribution and rights remain required
metadata.notes: English Al-Mukhtasar 266, English Ibn Kathir 35, and Arabic As-Saadi 308 inspected. Authenticated dataset downloads unavailable; file-level counts and integrity remain unverified.

nodes.label: QUL Topics and Concepts Public Schema Evidence

metadata.licenseName: No copyright information supplied by QUL
metadata.attribution: QUL topic resource; ontology attribution includes Quranic Arabic Corpus and thematic attribution includes The Clear Quran
metadata.notes: Public page reports 2,512 topics and a mixed ontology/thematic/general hierarchy. Download requires sign-in; dataset count and identifiers were not file-validated.

metadata.licenseName: No copyright information supplied by QUL for audited metadata resources
metadata.notes: Validated counts: 240 rub, 15 sajda, 558 ruku, 7 manzil, 60 hizb, 30 juz, 6236 ayahs, and 114 surahs. Every JSON/SQLite pair matches exactly.

nodes.label: QUL QPC Hafs Ayah by Ayah

metadata.licenseName: No copyright information supplied by QUL
metadata.notes: JSON and SQLite match exactly. Includes ayah-end numerals and requires a compatible QPC Hafs rendering font.

metadata.licenseName: No copyright information supplied by QUL
metadata.notes: JSON and SQLite match exactly. All canonical keys are present. Text is source-specific and must not be silently substituted for Tanzil.

metadata.licenseName: No copyright information supplied by QUL
metadata.attribution: Arabic Tafsir As-Saadi; exact edition, publisher, and required attribution remain unresolved
metadata.notes: JSON and SQLite match exactly and contain valid Arabic Unicode. All records are verse-level, but 59 records have blank tafsir text.

metadata.licenseName: No copyright information supplied by QUL
metadata.attribution: English Tafsir Ibn Kathir; exact edition, translator, publisher, and required attribution remain unresolved
metadata.notes: JSON and SQLite match exactly. Contains 1,902 main passages and 4,334 pointer records. Maximum observed group size is 20 ayahs.

metadata.licenseName: No copyright information supplied by QUL
metadata.attribution: English Al-Mukhtasar; original edition, translator, publisher, and required attribution remain unresolved
metadata.notes: JSON and SQLite match exactly. Contains 6,216 main passage records and 20 pointer records. All canonical ayah keys are present.

metadata.licenseName: No copyright information supplied by QUL
metadata.attribution: Composite QUL topic resource with upstream Quranic Arabic Corpus and The Clear Quran attribution; complete per-namespace rights remain unresolved
metadata.notes: 2,512 unique IDs, 30,687 valid ayah links, no broken parents, no hierarchy cycles, and no invalid related-topic references.

metadata.licenseName: No copyright information supplied by QUL
metadata.notes: JSON and SQLite match exactly. QUL and Tanzil Malay texts differ in 2092 records, with approximately 52 substantive differences after aggressive typography normalization. Basamia/Basmeih attribution remains unresolved.

metadata.licenseName: No copyright information supplied by QUL
metadata.notes: All JSON/SQLite pairs match. Contains 1904 valid footnotes across 1613 ayahs. QUL and Tanzil Saheeh texts are different editions.

metadata.licenseName: License applicability to metadata requires confirmation
metadata.notes: Contains surahs, 30 juz starts, 240 hizb-quarter starts, 7 manzil starts, 556 ruku starts, 604 page starts, and 15 sajda records. Metadata-specific license should be confirmed.

metadata.licenseName: Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 with Tanzil text terms
metadata.attribution: Tanzil Quran Text, Tanzil Project, https://tanzil.net
metadata.notes: Verbatim source must not be changed. The selected download prepends Bismillah to the first ayah of most surahs except At-Tawbah; presentation handling requires a deliberate design.

metadata.licenseName: Tanzil translation catalog terms: non-commercial use only unless separate permission is obtained
metadata.attribution: Saheeh International; distributed by Tanzil Project, https://tanzil.net/trans/
metadata.notes: Structurally complete. Production and commercial use are blocked until permission from the translator or publisher and required attribution are confirmed.

metadata.licenseName: Tanzil translation catalog terms: non-commercial use only unless separate permission is obtained
metadata.attribution: Indonesian Ministry of Religious Affairs; distributed by Tanzil Project, https://tanzil.net/trans/
metadata.notes: Optional Day 3 sample. Structurally complete; production use is blocked pending original-source rights and attribution confirmation.

metadata.licenseName: Tanzil translation catalog terms: non-commercial use only unless separate permission is obtained
metadata.attribution: Abdullah Muhammad Basmeih; distributed by Tanzil Project, https://tanzil.net/trans/
metadata.notes: Structurally complete. Use Abdullah Muhammad Basmeih as the audited attribution; QUL's Abdullah Basamia label remains an unresolved alias. Production use is blocked pending rights confirmation.
